## What

Brief description of the changes.

## Why

Motivation or context. Link to related issue if applicable (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## How

Key implementation details or approach.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] No hardcoded content (data goes in `data.js`)
- [ ] Works on both dark and light themes
- [ ] Responsive at 980px and 760px breakpoints
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
